title: Finn and the Lost Baby Elephant
synopsis: Young Finn discovers a lost baby elephant in the savanna and helps reunite her with her family through kindness and courage.

pages.text: Finn was playing in the tall golden grass when he heard a sad sound. "Waaah! Waaah!" Something was crying nearby. Finn looked around with his bright eyes. What could be making that noise?

illustration.description: A young boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes standing in tall golden savanna grass, looking curious and alert, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes and warm orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Finn listening carefully in the savanna grass

pages.text: Behind a big acacia tree, Finn found a tiny gray elephant! She was all alone and tears rolled down her wrinkled cheeks. "Don't cry, little elephant," Finn said gently. "I'm Finn. What's your name?"

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes kneeling beside a small crying baby elephant under an acacia tree, painted in gouache with expressive brushstrokes and warm savanna tones
illustration.alt: Finn comforting a sad baby elephant

pages.text: "I'm Kesi," sniffled the baby elephant. "I was following a pretty butterfly and got lost! I can't find my mama anywhere." Finn's kind heart felt sorry for Kesi. He wanted to help his new friend.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes sitting cross-legged next to a small elephant, with a colorful butterfly in the background, painted in textured gouache with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Finn and Kesi talking about the butterfly

pages.text: "Let's find your mama together!" Finn said bravely. They walked through the savanna, calling "Mama elephant! Mama elephant!" A tall giraffe poked his head down from the treetops.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking alongside a baby elephant while a friendly giraffe's long neck stretches down from above, painted in gouache with warm golden grass and orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Finn, Kesi, and a helpful giraffe in the savanna

pages.text: "I saw a herd of elephants by the watering hole," said the giraffe kindly. "Follow the path through those rocks." Finn and Kesi thanked the giraffe and hurried along the rocky path together.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes and a baby elephant walking on a path between large rocks, painted with thick brushstrokes and textured painterly technique in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Finn and Kesi following the rocky path

pages.text: At the watering hole, they saw hippos splashing and zebras drinking. But no elephants! "Where could they be?" wondered Kesi sadly. Just then, they heard a loud trumpet sound: "PFFFRRRR!"

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes and a baby elephant at a watering hole with hippos and zebras, painted in expressive gouache with bold confident strokes and orange sunset lighting
illustration.alt: The watering hole with various animals but no elephants

pages.text: "That's my mama!" cried Kesi excitedly. They ran toward the trumpeting sound and found a whole herd of elephants! Mama elephant was calling for her lost baby with her trunk raised high.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes running with a baby elephant toward a herd of large elephants, with the mother elephant's trunk raised, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes and warm golden grass
illustration.alt: Finn and Kesi running toward the elephant herd

pages.text: "Mama! Mama!" Kesi trumpeted happily and ran into her mother's loving trunk hug. "Thank you, Finn!" she called. "You're the best friend ever!" Mama elephant smiled warmly at the kind little boy.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes watching as a baby elephant hugs her mother with their trunks, painted in textured gouache with expressive animals and warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Happy reunion between Kesi and her mother

pages.text: Finn waved goodbye as the elephant family walked away together. He felt happy and proud. He had helped a friend in need! As the orange sunset painted the sky, Finn headed home with a big smile.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to elephants walking away in silhouette against an orange sunset sky, painted with bold confident strokes and warm savanna colors

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound did Finn hear in the grass?
questions.explanation: Finn heard crying - it was baby elephant Kesi who was lost and sad.

questions.question: What is the baby elephant's name?
questions.explanation: The baby elephant told Finn her name was Kesi.

questions.question: Who helped Finn and Kesi find the elephant herd?
questions.explanation: The tall giraffe told them where to find the elephants at the watering hole.

questions.question: How did Finn feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Finn felt happy and proud because he helped his new friend Kesi find her family.
